_**User**_

in existing project, create a see all page where each row all content cards will be shown there. use existing content card  @streamlist/src/utils/contentCardLayout.ts @streamlist/src/components/ContentCard.tsx style to show  and also on see all page, pagination logic we had done for rail should be same in see all page, if user scroll then next pagination data should be shown on screen. 
use existing api from where we showing data on homscreen.

According to the screenshot, see all shown on home screen for each rail. 
see all text style in pascal case, text color  - on_surface , font size - xs and should be aligned in opposite of each rail title.

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
**Implementing vertical scroll**

I'm adding a vertical scroll pagination utility similar to the existing horizontal one, using `ITEMS_FROM_END_THRESHOLD` pattern. I'm implementing vertical scroll pagination using the same threshold approach as the rail pagination, calculating `shouldLoadMoreOnScroll` based on items from end threshold. I'll switch to using a fixed pixel threshold based on estimated row height for vertical scroll. I'm switching to FlatList with numColumns={2} and onEndReached for vertical infinite scroll, calculating row height as posterFrameHeightFromOuterWidth(cardWidth) + copy block + gap. 

**Adding vertical scroll logic**

I'm adding `shouldLoadMoreVerticalGrid` helper to detect when to load more items in vertical grid scroll. I'm implementing vertical scroll detection using `contentSize.height`, `layoutMeasurement.height`, and `contentOffset.y` to calculate distance from end. I'm adding `shouldLoadMoreVerticalScroll` to horizontalScroll.ts for threshold calculation. 

I'm implementing the `shouldLoadMoreVerticalScroll` logic for horizontal scrolling with threshold calculations. </details></think>

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
**Designing layout**

I'm implementing the grid layout using FlatList with 2 columns based on the existing homeContentCardOuterWidth calculation. 

**Implementing grid layout**

I'm implementing the grid layout using FlatList with 2 columns and explicit card widths. I'm switching from FlatList to ScrollView with manual row grouping for better control over card widths. 

**Calculating card dimensions**

I'm calculating card widths using `Math.floor((contentWidth - gap) / 2)` for even distribution. I'm adjusting card width calculation to ensure two cards and gap fit within content width. 

I verified the card width calculation accounts for flooring and spacing correctly. I'm implementing the grid layout using exact widths from contentCardLayout, similar to SearchScreen. 

**Implementing scroll logic**

I'm implementing custom scroll logic with FlatList and onScroll throttling for infinite loading. I'm calculating the total height of ContentCard components including poster frame, copy block, and vertical spacing. 

**Calculating row height**

I'm implementing `seeAllGridRowHeight` to compute row height using `posterFrameHeightFromOuterWidth` and spacing values. I'm computing row height using `posterFrameHeightFromOuterWidth` and spacing values. 

**Optimizing scroll detection**

I'm implementing scroll detection logic for vertical list loading. 

**Implementing scroll detection**

I'm adding scroll detection logic to fetch more movies and handle loading states. I'm adjusting the hook signature to include PaginatedResponse for movies and GenreListResponse for genres. 

**Handling optional params**

I'm using optional chaining for discoverGenreKey since it's only required when rail is 'discover'. 

**Updating home screen**

I'm implementing the home screen layout with flex properties and adding a 'See All' pressable button. I'm adding the See All link styling with typography and color properties. </details></think>

_**Agent (default)**_

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
**Fixing error boundary**

I'm moving the hook to the SeeAllScreen parent to ensure proper refetch behavior with ScreenErrorBoundary. I'm adjusting the ScreenErrorBoundary to properly handle refetch behavior by passing refetch function from SeeAllScreen instead of using navigation.goBack. 

**Adjusting spacing**

I'm removing marginBottom from gridCell and relying on columnWrapper gap to avoid potential double gaps in FlatList layout. I'm removing marginBottom from gridCell since gap in listContent handles spacing for FlatList with 2 columns. 

**Removing unused prop**

I'm removing screenTitle prop from SeeAllScreenContent since the header title is handled by the parent component. 

**Fixing layout spacing**

I'm removing marginBottom from gridCell and using columnWrapper gaps for vertical spacing. 

**Fixing SeeAllScreen**

I'm removing unused screenTitle and fixing ScreenErrorBoundary to use refetch from hook. 

**Refactoring seeallscreen**

I'm refactoring SeeAllScreen into a single component with hooks at the top, header row, and error/loading/list sections. I'm fixing the navigation bug by using useCallback with [navigation] and removing screenTitle from SeeAllScreenContent props. </details></think>

_**Agent (default)**_


Refactoring `SeeAllScreen` so `useSeeAll` sits at the screen level (fixes `ScreenErrorBoundary` retry), removes the unused prop, and corrects the error-boundary retry handler.

<tool-use data-tool-type="unknown" data-tool-name="todo_write"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **todo_write**</summary>

</details></tool-use>

_**Agent (default)**_


Here’s what was implemented.

### What changed

1. **`SeeAll` stack screen** (`streamlist/src/screens/SeeAllScreen.tsx`)  
   - Two-column grid using the same widths as home (`homeContentCardOuterWidth`, `HOME_HORIZONTAL_CARD_GAP`) and the same `ContentCard` + `buildMovieCardSubtitle` + `IMAGE_SIZE_CARD` as home.  
   - Back control + screen title from navigation params.  
   - **Pagination:** `onScroll` + `shouldLoadMoreVerticalList` uses the same **3-item-from-end** rule as `shouldLoadMoreMoviesRow`, with row stride from `seeAllGridRowStride` (aligned with the card layout).

2. **`useSeeAll` hook** (`streamlist/src/hooks/useSeeAll.ts`)  
   - Loads genres + first page with the same APIs as home: `fetchTrendingMoviesWeek`, `fetchTopRatedMovies`, `fetchDiscoverMovies` (with `buildWithGenresOrParam` for “All”), and appends pages the same way as `useHome` (`mergeMovieResults`, `page` / `total_pages` guards).

3. **Vertical scroll helper** (`streamlist/src/utils/horizontalScroll.ts`)  
   - `shouldLoadMoreVerticalList` mirrors the horizontal threshold logic for vertical scroll.

4. **Row height for thresholds** (`streamlist/src/utils/contentCardLayout.ts`)  
   - `seeAllGridRowStride` estimates one grid row height (poster + copy block + spacing) for pagination.

5. **Navigation** (`streamlist/src/navigation/types.ts`, `streamlist/src/navigation/RootNavigator.tsx`)  
   - `SeeAll` params: `discover` includes `discoverGenreKey`; `trending` / `topRated` only need `rail` + `screenTitle`.

6. **Home** (`streamlist/src/screens/HomeScreen.tsx`)  
   - Each rail uses a **header row**: title on the left, **“See All”** on the right (`justifyContent: 'space-between'`, `alignItems: 'center'`).  
   - Link style: `typography.fontSize.xs`, `colors.on_surface`, `typography.fontFamily.interMedium`.

7. **Tests**  
   - `horizontalScroll.test.ts`: vertical cases.  
   - `contentCardLayout.test.ts`: basic check for `seeAllGridRowStride`.

### Files touched

| File | Purpose |
|------|--------|
| `streamlist/src/screens/SeeAllScreen.tsx` | New See All UI |
| `streamlist/src/hooks/useSeeAll.ts` | Data + pagination |
| `streamlist/src/utils/horizontalScroll.ts` | `shouldLoadMoreVerticalList` |
| `streamlist/src/utils/contentCardLayout.ts` | `seeAllGridRowStride` |
| `streamlist/src/navigation/types.ts` | `SeeAll` / `SeeAllScreenParams` |
| `streamlist/src/navigation/RootNavigator.tsx` | Register `SeeAll` |
| `streamlist/src/screens/HomeScreen.tsx` | Section headers + “See All” |
| `streamlist/__tests__/horizontalScroll.test.ts` | New tests |
| `streamlist/__tests__/contentCardLayout.test.ts` | New test |

All Jest tests pass and `tsc --noEmit` succeeds.

**Note:** “See All” is rendered as **title case** (`See All`), which matches the screenshot; if you literally need **PascalCase** (`SeeAll`), say so and we can change the string.

---

_**Agent (default)**_

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
**Removing highlight**

I'm removing the highlight color on the see all page by adjusting the Pressable component's android ripple settings. I'm disabling the Android ripple effect on the Pressable component by setting `android_ripple={null}` to remove the highlight. I'm verifying the correct way to disable Android ripple on Pressable - using `android_ripple={{ color: 'transparent' }}` or `foreground: false` based on RN version. 

**Updating pressable components**

I'm updating Pressable components to remove highlights using `android_ripple={null}` as per native docs. I'm removing Android ripple and adjusting pressed styles to match the design requirement of no highlights. I'm adjusting the Android ripple to match the surface color, setting `android_ripple={{ color: colors.surface }}` to make it invisible since colors.surface is #131313. 

**Adjusting safe area layout**

I'm simplifying the SafeAreaView usage by adding manual top padding instead of complex edge handling. I'm using `useSafeAreaInsets` to dynamically adjust top padding and avoid breaking notch devices. I'm implementing dynamic top padding using `useSafeAreaInsets` to reduce spacing above titles while maintaining notch compatibility. I'm reducing top padding to half insets to avoid excessive spacing on devices with large safe areas.
